content.text:
測試SEL_Explain the word “registration”.
解釋「註冊」這個詞
content.assessment_standard:
10	Registration is the process of officially signing up for something, such as a school or a course. In universities, students need to complete their course registration before the semester starts to secure their seats in classes. This often involves selecting courses, paying fees, and confirming schedules. Without registration, students cannot attend classes or receive grades.|Registration refers to the process of signing up for an event, such as a conference or a workshop. Many events require online registration in advance to manage attendance and prepare materials. Participants usually need to fill out a form and sometimes pay a fee. After registration, they receive a confirmation email with event details.|Registration applies to official records, such as registering a vehicle or a marriage. It involves submitting necessary documents to a government office for legal recognition. For example, when registering a car, you must provide proof of ownership and pay fees. Without proper registration, using the vehicle legally may not be possible.
9	Registration is the process of signing up for something. In universities, students need to register for their courses before the semester starts. This means choosing courses and paying fees. Without registration, students cannot go to class.|Registration is the process of signing up for an event, like a concert or an activity. Many events need online registration. People usually need to fill out a form and sometimes pay a fee. After registration, they receive a confirmation email.|Registration refers to official records, like registering a vehicle or a marriage. It requires sending necessary documents to the government. For example, to register a car, you need proof of ownership and to pay fees. Without it, you may not be allowed to use it.
8	Registration means signing up for something. In school, students must do course registration before school starts. They need to choose classes and sometimes pay fees.|Registration is needed to join events like conferences. People fill out a form and may pay a fee. Then, they get an email with details.|Registration is when you make something official, like a car or marriage. It usually needs documents and a fee. Without it, you can’t use it.
7	Registration means sign up for school. Student must choose classes and register. They cannot go to class without it.|People register for events like concerts. They write their name and sometimes pay money. Then they can join.|Registration is for cars or get married. People need documents. It makes things official.
6	Registration is for school. Student pick class. Then they can go school.|Registration is to join event. You write name. Then you go.|Car registration is needed. People give paper. Then okay.
5	Student do registration. Pick class. Then school start.|Event need registration. Write name. Then can go.|Car need registration. Give paper. Then use.
4	Student registration class. Then go school.|Registration event. Write name. Go.|Car registration. Give paper. Drive.
3	Registration school. Pick class.|Write name. Event okay.|Car registration. Paper need.
2	Student registration.|Registration.|Write paper.
1	(Complete silence / No response)

content.text:
測試SEL_Respond to the question using the given information:
When does exhibition ‘Modern Works’ start?
根據提供的資訊，回答以下問題：
「現代作品」展覽何時開始？
content.assessment_standard:
10	The exhibition ‘Modern Works’ starts on May 1.|The ‘Modern Works’ exhibition will begin on May 1.|The start date of the ‘Modern Works’ exhibition is May 1.
7	The ‘Modern Works’ start May 1.|Modern Works begin on May 1.|It starts on May 1.
4	May 1.|Start May 1.|Modern Work, May 1.
1	(No response / Silence)|Umm.

content.text:
測試SEL_Respond to the question:
What’s the best place for a first date? Why?
回答問題：
第一次約會的最佳地點是什麼？為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	A restaurant is one of the best places for a first date because it offers a calm and elegant atmosphere. Couples can talk comfortably while enjoying delicious food. The soft lighting and background music create a romantic experience, making the date feel special. Having dinner together also gives people a chance to learn about each other’s tastes and preferences.|A coffee shop is a great place for a first date because it is casual and relaxing. People can chat while drinking coffee, and if the conversation is enjoyable, they can stay longer. The cozy environment helps reduce nervousness and makes getting to know each other easier. Coffee shops are also convenient since they are easy to find and not too expensive.|An amusement park is a fun place for a first date because it creates excitement and shared experiences. Couples can go on rides together, play games, and enjoy snacks. The lively atmosphere helps break the ice and makes the date more enjoyable. Doing exciting activities together can also make people feel more connected.
9	A restaurant is the best place for a first date because it is calm and elegant. Couples can talk happily while enjoying delicious food. The light and music make it romantic and special. Eating dinner together also lets people learn about each other.|A coffee shop is a great place for a first date. People can chat while drinking coffee, and they can talk as long as they like. It’s casual and relaxing so people are less nervous. Coffee shops are also easy to find and not too expensive.|An amusement park is a fun place for a first date. Couples can go on rides together, play games, and enjoy snacks. The lively atmosphere helps make the date more fun. Doing exciting things together can also make people feel closer.
8	A restaurant is a good place for a first date because it is quiet and comfortable. People can talk and enjoy their food. A fancy restaurant also makes the date feel special.|A coffee shop is a nice place to meet. It is simple and comfortable, and people can talk and enjoy coffee. The date can be long or short, depending on how it goes.|An amusement park is a fun choice for a first date. There are rides, games, and snacks. It is exciting, and people can enjoy the time together.
7	A nice restaurant is good for first date. The place is quiet, and people can talk. The food is also delicious, that makes the date better.|A coffee shop is good. It is relaxing, and people can drink coffee and chat. The atmosphere is not too serious, so it easy to talk.|Amusement park is fun. People can go on rides and eat food. The games and activities make the date interesting.
6	A restaurant is a good place. It is quiet, and people eat and talk. The food is nice.|Coffee shop is fun. I drink coffee and talk with my date. It is a nice place.|Amusement park good. We play roller coasters and eat snacks. It is exciting.
5	A restaurant is good place. People eating food and talk. It quiet and nice.|Coffee shop good. Drink coffee, talk happy. It relax place.|Amusement park fun. We rides and play games. It make me happy.
4	Restaurant good. People eat. Talk happy.|Coffee shop nice. Drink coffee. People talk fun.|Amusement park fun. People play. Play happy.
3	Restaurant is good. Eat food. Talk date.|Coffee shop fun. Sit drink. Talk good.|Park fun. Play games. Happy time.
2	Restaurant.|Coffee shop, drink coffee.|Park, good play.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
測試SEL_Respond to the question:
What is the main reason couples break up?
回答問題：
情侶分手的主要原因是什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	One of the main reasons couples break up is poor communication. When partners do not express their feelings or listen to each other, misunderstandings occur. This can lead to frequent arguments and frustration, making it difficult to maintain a healthy relationship. Over time, lack of communication can create emotional distance and eventually cause a breakup.|Trust issues are common reason for breakups. If one partner constantly doubts the other, it can create tension and insecurity. Cheating, dishonesty, or keeping secrets can damage trust and make it hard to rebuild. Without trust, a relationship becomes unstable and stressful, leading to separation.|Couples break up when they have different life goals. If one person wants to focus on their career while the other prefers to start a family, it can create conflicts. Over time, these differences may become too difficult to resolve. When partners do not share the same vision for the future, the relationship may not last.
9	The main reason couples break up is poor communication. When partners do not tell each other how they feel, misunderstandings happen. This can cause arguments so it difficult to stay together. After time, communication problems can cause a breakup.|Trust issues are a big reason for breakups. If partners doubt each other, it causes stress and insecurity. Cheating and secrets can break trust and make it hard. Without trust, a relationship is unstable and stressful, so partners separate.|If couples have different goals, they can break up. If one person wants to focus on their job and the other wants to have a family, it can make arguments. Over time, these disagreements can become too hard to solve. If partners don’t agree, they can’t stay together.
8	The reason couples break up is bad communication. When people do not talk and listen, they have misunderstandings. This leads to arguments and problems in the relationship.|Lack of trust is a serious issue. If one person is dishonest or hides things, the other person may feel not secure. Trust problems make relationships unhappy and lead to breakups.|Sometimes, people have different goals. One person maybe wants to get married, but the other maybe wants to travel. If they cannot agree, they break up.
7	Big reason for breakups is no communication. The couple fights because they do not talk. It makes them feel bad and unhappy.|Trust problems break relationships. When one person lies, other feels bad. No trust means no relationship.|Different life goal cause breakups. If one wants a family but another wants a job, they cannot stay together.
6	A couple needs to talk. If no talk, fights happen. People feel bad and break up.|Trust is important. If no trust, people sad. They break up.|People want different things. No same dream. Break up happen.
5	No talking, is problem. People fight. Break up happen.|Lying bad. People sad. Trust go away.|Want different things. No stay together. Life different.
4	No talk. People fight. Break up bad.|Lying. People sad. No trust.|Want different. No same. No together.
3	No talk. Problem. Break up.|No trust. Sad. Gone.|Different want. No stay. Bye.
2	Talk no enough.|Lie, so bad.|No same.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
測試SEL_Respond to the question:
How would you describe your ideal dating partner?
回答問題：
你認為理想的對象需要具備什麼條件？
content.assessment_standard:
10	My ideal partner would have a genuine smile and sparkling eyes that reflect warmth and kindness. They should be calm, considerate, and always willing to communicate openly. Physical attraction is important to me, but emotional connection matters more. I love the idea of sharing hobbies and experiences, whether it’s exploring new places or cooking dinner together at home.|I imagine my ideal partner to have a caring demeanor and a positive outlook on life. They should be someone who enjoys having deep conversations as well as light-hearted moments. While attraction is essential, I believe it is equally important for us to understand and support each other's dreams and goals. A strong emotional bond and shared values are key to maintaining a strong connection.|The ideal partner for me would be someone who is not only good-looking but also emotionally intelligent. They should be able to understand and respect my emotions. Someone who enjoys spending time with me, whether it's doing something active or just relaxing, would be perfect. Trust and open communication are crucial for me to feel comfortable and secure in the relationship.
9	My ideal partner would be someone with a nice smile and kind eyes. They should be caring and nice to others. I like it when we can do things together, like walking in the park or going out for dinner. I also want someone who listens to me and values what I say.|I want my partner to be someone who is kind and thoughtful. They should be good-looking to me, but also emotionally strong. I need someone who enjoys spending time with me and respects my opinions. Having a sense of humor and enjoying life together is important.|My ideal partner should be easy-going and caring. They should have a good smile and look pleasant. I want someone who enjoys talking and spending time with me, doing activities like watching movies or going out to eat. It’s important that we share similar interests.
8	My ideal partner would have a nice smile and kind eyes. They should be kind to me and other people. I think it's good when we enjoy doing things together. I want someone who listens and talks with me.|A good partner should be caring and fun, and someone who looks nice. We should be able to do fun things, like eating or walking outside. I like when they enjoy life.|I want a partner who has a good smile and is kind. They should like to do things together. I love someone who talks to me and listens to me. It’s important that we care about each other.
7	My ideal partner has a good smile. They are kind and care and I like when we do fun things together. We should talk and listen to each other.|My partner should be caring, kind is important. They should have nice smile. I want to do things together, like eat or talk.|I want my partner be nice, smile and caring. We can enjoy doing things like walking and eating. It’s good if they listen to me.
6	My partner is good and nice. They smile and care. I want do things together.|Partner should be kind. They should smile and look nice. We talk and eat together.|I want my partner to smile more. They should care me. We can enjoy talking.
5	My partner nice. They smile, care. I wanna do thing together.|Partner should kind. He can smile. We talk and eat together.|I want my partner smile. They should caring. We can enjoy talk.
4	Partner kind. She smile. We do things.|Smile is good. Care. Talk.|Partner is good. We smile. Talk.
3	Nice smile. Friend.|Smile face. Good people.|Partner good. Talk.
2	Nice.|Smile good.|Talk.
1	(No response / Silence)
